vocab.meaning: một viễn cảnh đáng sợ/làm nản chí
vocab.example: Facing a three-hour advanced calculus exam was always a daunting prospect for me during university.

vocab.meaning: thuật ngữ chuyên ngành dày đặc/khó hiểu
vocab.example: I found Legal Studies nearly impossible to master because of the dense jargon used in every textbook.

vocab.meaning: yêu cầu về khả năng nhận thức/tư duy
vocab.example: The high cognitive demand of Quantum Physics often left me feeling completely drained after lectures.

vocab.meaning: những khái niệm cực kỳ trừu tượng
vocab.example: Philosophy was a struggle because it deals with highly abstract concepts that have no tangible form.

vocab.meaning: điểm nghẽn trong khả năng phân tích
vocab.example: Data science is my weakest point; I always hit an analytical bottleneck when dealing with multi-layered algorithms.

vocab.meaning: sự phức tạp thuần túy/tột độ
vocab.example: The sheer complexity of organic chemistry reactions makes it the most grueling subject I’ve ever encountered.

vocab.meaning: rào cản tâm lý/sự tắc nghẽn tư duy
vocab.example: I have a total mental block when it comes to numbers, which is why Accounting is such a nightmare for me.

vocab.meaning: ngập tràn lý thuyết/nặng về lý thuyết
vocab.example: I prefer practical subjects, so Macroeconomics felt far too steeped in theory for my liking.
No matter how much I practiced, I could never quite fathom the logic behind complex coding languages.
It took me years of extra tuition just to attain a basic level of proficiency in Mandarin.
